Bash(PGCLIENTENCODING=UTF8 python -c "
import psycopg2
conn = psycopg2.connect\(host='localhost', port=5432, dbname='winegod_db', user='postgres', password='postgres', options='-c client_encoding=UTF8'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT 1'\)
print\('Connected:', cur.fetchone\(\)\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 LANG=en_US.UTF-8 python -c "
import os
os.environ['PGCLIENTENCODING'] = 'UTF8'
import psycopg2
conn = psycopg2.connect\(host='localhost', port=5432, dbname='winegod_db', user='postgres', password='postgres'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT 1'\)
print\('OK:', cur.fetchone\(\)\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "SELECT destino, COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final GROUP BY destino ORDER BY destino;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Distribuicao de scores no Destino A
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN match_score >= 0.90 THEN '0.90+'
        WHEN match_score >= 0.80 THEN '0.80-0.89'
        WHEN match_score >= 0.70 THEN '0.70-0.79'
        WHEN match_score >= 0.60 THEN '0.60-0.69'
        WHEN match_score >= 0.50 THEN '0.50-0.59'
        WHEN match_score >= 0.40 THEN '0.40-0.49'
        ELSE '<0.40'
    END as faixa,
    COUNT\(*\) as qtd,
    COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) as vivino_unicos
FROM match_results_final 
WHERE destino = 'A'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Contagem por faixa de lojas
SELECT faixa, COUNT\(*\) as vinhos_unicos, SUM\(cnt\) as registros
FROM \(
    SELECT vivino_id,
        COUNT\(*\) as cnt,
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT\(*\) >= 1000 THEN '1000+'
            WHEN COUNT\(*\) >= 500 THEN '500-999'
            WHEN COUNT\(*\) >= 100 THEN '100-499'
            WHEN COUNT\(*\) >= 50 THEN '50-99'
            WHEN COUNT\(*\) >= 10 THEN '10-49'
            WHEN COUNT\(*\) >= 5 THEN '5-9'
            WHEN COUNT\(*\) >= 2 THEN '2-4'
            ELSE '1'
        END as faixa
    FROM match_results_final WHERE destino = 'A'
    GROUP BY vivino_id
\) sub
GROUP BY faixa
ORDER BY MIN\(cnt\) DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Top 20 vinhos com mais lojas 
SELECT vivino_id, COUNT\(*\) as lojas, 
       MIN\(loja_nome\) as ex_loja,
       MIN\(vivino_nome\) as ex_vivino,
       ROUND\(AVG\(match_score\)::numeric, 3\) as avg_score
FROM match_results_final 
WHERE destino = 'A'
GROUP BY vivino_id 
ORDER BY COUNT\(*\) DESC 
LIMIT 20;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Score medio por faixa de lojas \(pra ver correlacao\)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN cnt >= 100 THEN '100+'
        WHEN cnt >= 50 THEN '50-99'
        WHEN cnt >= 10 THEN '10-49'
        WHEN cnt >= 5 THEN '5-9'
        WHEN cnt >= 2 THEN '2-4'
        ELSE '1'
    END as faixa_lojas,
    COUNT\(*\) as vinhos,
    ROUND\(AVG\(avg_score\)::numeric, 3\) as score_medio
FROM \(
    SELECT vivino_id, COUNT\(*\) as cnt, AVG\(match_score\) as avg_score
    FROM match_results_final WHERE destino = 'A'
    GROUP BY vivino_id
\) sub
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN\(cnt\) DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Amostra de 20 matches score >= 0.80 com 1-3 lojas \(alta confianca\)
SELECT m.clean_id, m.vivino_id, ROUND\(m.match_score::numeric, 3\), m.loja_nome, m.vivino_nome
FROM match_results_final m
WHERE m.destino = 'A' AND m.match_score >= 0.80
AND m.vivino_id IN \(
    SELECT vivino_id FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' 
    GROUP BY vivino_id HAVING COUNT\(*\) <= 3
\)
ORDER BY m.match_score DESC
LIMIT 20;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Amostra de 20 matches score 0.45-0.55 \(baixa confianca\) - pra avaliar qualidade
SELECT m.clean_id, m.vivino_id, ROUND\(m.match_score::numeric, 3\), m.loja_nome, m.vivino_nome
FROM match_results_final m
WHERE m.destino = 'A' AND m.match_score BETWEEN 0.45 AND 0.55
ORDER BY RANDOM\(\)
LIMIT 20;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
SELECT CASE 
    WHEN match_score >= 0.80 THEN '0.80+'
    WHEN match_score >= 0.70 THEN '0.70-0.79'
    WHEN match_score >= 0.60 THEN '0.60-0.69'
    WHEN match_score >= 0.50 THEN '0.50-0.59'
    ELSE '<0.50'
END as faixa, COUNT\(*\) as registros, COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) as vivino_unicos
FROM match_results_final
WHERE destino = 'A'
AND vivino_id IN \(SELECT vivino_id FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' GROUP BY vivino_id HAVING COUNT\(*\) <= 50\)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Quantos vivino_ids do destino A ja existem no Vivino \(i.e. ja estao no Render\)
SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT m.vivino_id\) as total_a,
       COUNT\(DISTINCT CASE WHEN v.id IS NOT NULL THEN m.vivino_id END\) as ja_no_vivino
FROM \(SELECT DISTINCT vivino_id FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A'\) m
LEFT JOIN vivino_match v ON v.id = m.vivino_id;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Cenario conservador: score >= 0.70 E lojas <= 50
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as registros, COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) as vivino_unicos
FROM match_results_final
WHERE destino = 'A' AND match_score >= 0.70
AND vivino_id IN \(SELECT vivino_id FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' GROUP BY vivino_id HAVING COUNT\(*\) <= 50\);
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Cenario moderado: score >= 0.60 E lojas <= 30
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as registros, COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) as vivino_unicos
FROM match_results_final
WHERE destino = 'A' AND match_score >= 0.60
AND vivino_id IN \(SELECT vivino_id FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' GROUP BY vivino_id HAVING COUNT\(*\) <= 30\);
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Quantas wine_sources ja existem no Render?
-- E quantos wines no Render tem preco?
SELECT 
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM vivino_match\) as vivino_total,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM wines_final WHERE destino = 'B'\) as vinhos_novos_b,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM wines_final WHERE destino = 'B' AND wine_likeness >= 4\) as vinhos_b_alta_confianca;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Colunas da wines_final
SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'wines_final' ORDER BY ordinal_position;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- MAPA COMPLETO: todas as piscinas de dados
-- 1. Destino A por faixa de score
SELECT 'A score>=0.80' as pool, COUNT\(*\) as registros, COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) as unicos FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score >= 0.80
UNION ALL
SELECT 'A score 0.70-0.79', COUNT\(*\), COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score >= 0.70 AND match_score < 0.80
UNION ALL
SELECT 'A score 0.60-0.69', COUNT\(*\), COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score >= 0.60 AND match_score < 0.70
UNION ALL
SELECT 'A score 0.50-0.59', COUNT\(*\), COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score >= 0.50 AND match_score < 0.60
UNION ALL
SELECT 'A score <0.50', COUNT\(*\), COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score < 0.50
UNION ALL
-- 2. B por wine_likeness
SELECT 'B wl>=4', COUNT\(*\), 0 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='B' AND wine_likeness >= 4
UNION ALL
SELECT 'B wl=3', COUNT\(*\), 0 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='B' AND wine_likeness = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT 'B wl<3', COUNT\(*\), 0 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='B' AND wine_likeness < 3
UNION ALL
-- 3. C2
SELECT 'C2 total', COUNT\(*\), 0 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='C2'
UNION ALL
-- 4. D e E
SELECT 'D total', COUNT\(*\), 0 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='D'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'E total', COUNT\(*\), 0 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='E';
")

SELECT wine_likeness, COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='C2' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
")

SELECT wine_likeness, COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='D' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Amostra de 30 C2 com wl=2 \(mais provaveis de ser vinho\)
SELECT loja_nome FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='C2' AND wine_likeness=2 ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 30;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Amostra de 30 C2 com wl=1 \(mais duvidosos\)
SELECT loja_nome FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='C2' AND wine_likeness=1 ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 30;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Amostra de 30 D com wl=0 \(pra confirmar que realmente nao sao vinhos\)
SELECT loja_nome FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='D' AND wine_likeness=0 ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 30;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Quantos do D podem ter vinhos? Vamos ver os que tem >= 3 palavras no nome
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_d,
       COUNT\(CASE WHEN array_length\(string_to_array\(loja_nome, ' '\), 1\) >= 3 THEN 1 END\) as d_3plus_palavras,
       COUNT\(CASE WHEN array_length\(string_to_array\(loja_nome, ' '\), 1\) >= 5 THEN 1 END\) as d_5plus_palavras
FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='D';
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- A com lojas > 50: quantos registros e vinhos
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as registros, COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) as vivino_ids
FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A'
AND vivino_id IN \(SELECT vivino_id FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' GROUP BY vivino_id HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 50\);
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Vinhos do A com match errado: eles SAO vinhos reais, so o link esta errado
-- Quantos registros do A tem score < 0.50? Esses provavelmente sao vinhos validos com match errado
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_a_baixo, 
       COUNT\(CASE WHEN wine_likeness >= 3 THEN 1 END\) as wl_3plus
FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score < 0.50;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Vamos quantificar exatamente o trabalho
SELECT 
  'C2 classificar' as tarefa, COUNT\(*\) as itens, CEIL\(COUNT\(*\)/200.0\) as requests_200_por_lote
FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='C2'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'A validar match \(score<0.80\)', COUNT\(*\), CEIL\(COUNT\(*\)/200.0\)
FROM \(SELECT DISTINCT vivino_id FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score < 0.80\) sub
UNION ALL
SELECT 'D auditar \(3+ palavras\)', COUNT\(*\), CEIL\(COUNT\(*\)/200.0\)
FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='D' AND array_length\(string_to_array\(loja_nome, ' '\), 1\) >= 3;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Numeros exatos pra calcular custo
SELECT 'C2' as pool, COUNT\(*\) as itens FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='C2'
UNION ALL SELECT 'D \(3+ palavras\)', COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='D' AND array_length\(string_to_array\(loja_nome, ' '\), 1\) >= 3
UNION ALL SELECT 'A validar match', COUNT\(DISTINCT vivino_id\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score < 0.80
UNION ALL SELECT 'TOTAL 3 tarefas', 0;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Quantos itens totais precisam passar pelo LLM \(excluindo E e A>=0.80\)
SELECT 'A score<0.80' as pool, COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score < 0.80
UNION ALL SELECT 'B', COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='B'
UNION ALL SELECT 'C2', COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='C2'
UNION ALL SELECT 'D \(3+ palavras\)', COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='D' AND array_length\(string_to_array\(loja_nome, ' '\), 1\) >= 3
UNION ALL SELECT 'A score>=0.80', COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score >= 0.80;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Tamanho medio dos nomes em tokens \(aprox = palavras\)
SELECT 
  ROUND\(AVG\(array_length\(string_to_array\(loja_nome, ' '\), 1\)\), 1\) as media_palavras,
  ROUND\(AVG\(LENGTH\(loja_nome\)\), 0\) as media_chars
FROM match_results_final
WHERE destino IN \('A','B','C2','D'\)
LIMIT 1;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Pegar 30 itens reais em ordem alfabetica, misturando pools
\(SELECT loja_nome, destino, match_score, wine_likeness FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' AND match_score < 0.80 AND loja_nome >= 'bar' ORDER BY loja_nome LIMIT 10\)
UNION ALL
\(SELECT loja_nome, destino, match_score, wine_likeness FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='C2' AND loja_nome >= 'bar' ORDER BY loja_nome LIMIT 10\)
UNION ALL
\(SELECT loja_nome, destino, match_score, wine_likeness FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='D' AND loja_nome >= 'bar' AND array_length\(string_to_array\(loja_nome, ' '\), 1\) >= 3 ORDER BY loja_nome LIMIT 10\)
ORDER BY 1;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Pegar mais items na faixa 'bar' pra exemplo completo
SELECT loja_nome, destino, ROUND\(COALESCE\(match_score,0\)::numeric, 2\) as score
FROM match_results_final 
WHERE loja_nome >= 'bar dog' AND loja_nome < 'baron'
ORDER BY loja_nome LIMIT 40;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Agora pegar uma faixa mais diversa: 'baro' a 'barro' \(barones, baronesa, barossa, etc\)
SELECT loja_nome, destino, ROUND\(COALESCE\(match_score,0\)::numeric, 2\) as score
FROM match_results_final 
WHERE loja_nome >= 'baron' AND loja_nome < 'barro'
ORDER BY loja_nome LIMIT 40;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Amostra de 20 vinhos vivino_match — ver todos os campos
SELECT id, produtor_normalizado, nome_normalizado, safra, tipo, pais, regiao
FROM vivino_match 
ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 20;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
SET client_encoding TO 'UTF8';
SELECT id, produtor_normalizado, nome_normalizado, COALESCE\(safra,''\), tipo, pais, COALESCE\(regiao,''\)
FROM vivino_match 
WHERE produtor_normalizado ~ '^[a-z]' 
ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 20;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Simular busca com produtor limpo do LLM: 'baron albert'
SELECT id, produtor_normalizado, nome_normalizado, tipo, pais, regiao
FROM vivino_match 
WHERE produtor_normalizado ILIKE '%baron albert%'
ORDER BY nome_normalizado;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Verificar a distribuicao pra amostra proporcional de 5000
SELECT destino, COUNT\(*\) as total, 
       ROUND\(COUNT\(*\) * 5000.0 / \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE destino != 'E'\), 0\) as amostra
FROM match_results_final 
WHERE destino != 'E'
GROUP BY destino ORDER BY destino;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Extrair 5000 itens proporcionais, ordenados alfabeticamente
-- Usar TABLESAMPLE pra ser rapido, depois ordenar
CREATE TEMP TABLE teste_5000 AS
\(SELECT clean_id, loja_nome, destino, match_score, wine_likeness, vivino_id, vivino_nome 
 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='A' ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 3001\)
UNION ALL
\(SELECT clean_id, loja_nome, destino, match_score, wine_likeness, vivino_id, vivino_nome 
 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='B' ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 327\)
UNION ALL
\(SELECT clean_id, loja_nome, destino, match_score, wine_likeness, vivino_id, vivino_nome 
 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='C2' ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 578\)
UNION ALL
\(SELECT clean_id, loja_nome, destino, match_score, wine_likeness, vivino_id, vivino_nome 
 FROM match_results_final WHERE destino='D' ORDER BY RANDOM\(\) LIMIT 1094\);

SELECT COUNT\(*\), MIN\(loja_nome\), MAX\(loja_nome\) FROM teste_5000;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Achar uma faixa alfabetica com ~300 itens e boa diversidade
SELECT substr\(loja_nome, 1, 3\) as prefixo, COUNT\(*\) as qtd
FROM match_results_final
WHERE loja_nome >= 'cas' AND loja_nome < 'caz'
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 20;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -c "\\COPY \(SELECT clean_id, loja_nome, destino, COALESCE\(ROUND\(match_score::numeric,3\),0\) as score, wine_likeness, COALESCE\(vivino_id,0\) as vid, COALESCE\(vivino_nome,''\) as vnome FROM match_results_final WHERE loja_nome >= 'castle' AND loja_nome < 'cav' ORDER BY loja_nome LIMIT 300\) TO 'C:/winegod-app/scripts/teste_vivino_id_300.csv' WITH CSV HEADER")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -c "\\COPY \(SELECT clean_id, loja_nome, destino, COALESCE\(ROUND\(match_score::numeric,3\),0\) as score, wine_likeness, COALESCE\(vivino_id,0\) as vid, COALESCE\(vivino_nome,''\) as vnome FROM match_results_final WHERE loja_nome >= 'catena' AND loja_nome < 'cave' ORDER BY loja_nome LIMIT 300\) TO 'C:/winegod-app/scripts/teste_dedup_300.csv' WITH CSV HEADER")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Ver como produtor e nome sao armazenados no vivino_match
SELECT produtor_normalizado, nome_normalizado FROM vivino_match 
WHERE produtor_normalizado ILIKE '%chateau l%' LIMIT 10;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- 5 faixas de 300 itens cada, misturando pools
SELECT 'test1' as t, COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE loja_nome >= 'mon' AND loja_nome < 'mor'
UNION ALL SELECT 'test2', COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE loja_nome >= 'pin' AND loja_nome < 'pir'
UNION ALL SELECT 'test3', COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE loja_nome >= 'rie' AND loja_nome < 'rob'
UNION ALL SELECT 'test4', COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE loja_nome >= 'san' AND loja_nome < 'sar'
UNION ALL SELECT 'test5', COUNT\(*\) FROM match_results_final WHERE loja_nome >= 'vin' AND loja_nome < 'vir';
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -c "\\COPY \(SELECT clean_id, loja_nome, destino, COALESCE\(ROUND\(match_score::numeric,3\),0\) as score, wine_likeness, COALESCE\(vivino_id,0\) as vid, COALESCE\(vivino_nome,''''\) as vnome FROM match_results_final WHERE loja_nome >= ''bor'' AND loja_nome < ''bou'' ORDER BY loja_nome LIMIT 300\) TO ''C:/winegod-app/scripts/teste_combo_300.csv'' WITH CSV HEADER")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Quantos duplicados existem?
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(*\) - COUNT\(DISTINCT clean_id\) as duplicados FROM y2_results;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "
-- Remover duplicados, manter o de maior id \(mais recente\)
DELETE FROM y2_results WHERE id NOT IN \(
    SELECT MAX\(id\) FROM y2_results GROUP BY clean_id
\);
SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM y2_results;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -c "CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_wines_clean_nome ON wines_clean\(nome_normalizado\);" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -t -A -c "SELECT nome_normalizado FROM wines_clean WHERE id > 500000 ORDER BY id LIMIT 100;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -c "
-- Testar 1 query pra ver quanto demora
EXPLAIN ANALYZE
SELECT id, produtor_normalizado, nome_normalizado,
       similarity\(texto_busca, 'louis jadot chambertin grand cru'\) as ts
FROM vivino_match WHERE texto_busca % 'louis jadot chambertin grand cru'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -c "
-- Testar busca por produtor exato \(ILIKE\) — muito mais rapida
EXPLAIN ANALYZE
SELECT id, produtor_normalizado, nome_normalizado
FROM vivino_match WHERE produtor_normalizado = 'louis jadot'
LIMIT 20;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres123 "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d winegod_db -c "SET client_encoding TO 'UTF8'; EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT id, produtor_normalizado, nome_normalizado FROM vivino_match WHERE produtor_normalizado = 'louis jadot' LIMIT 20;")
